{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205712A4337A48CEC715573BBF"}"},"total":343},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7334592411201110808","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉整体都很好(✪▽✪)就是中间有一段，花城，没有怪罪的意思(=¯ω¯=)刚看到赌坊的时候我就已经开始想了(っ-｡)结果是真的，但是超好看✧٩(ˊωˋ*)و✧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707721114,"group_id":"7308268153224580158","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我讨厌你","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4G/jblcSO90k0WBkuMEwicNu3dUIKe/gMapVnMQ7fHw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9fe1bdf6abf74e4c8f33a57856f994f4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793556&x-signature=%2FuUrwdYnBuuK2nR1GUv0IrHUBbY%3D","user_id":"2265460668108652","user_name":"聂小谦的狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2265460668108652","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7308268153224580158","book_info":{"abstract":"（已完结）【双男主＋娱乐圈＋灵异＋双强＋非典型疯批】
●大人，你在我墓前送的花，成了我此生的信仰。
　　白清徐——驱鬼界第一混子败类，一朝穿越，成了娱乐圈十八线小糊咖，还是黑糊的那种，驱鬼界的低保吃不了了，只能努力营业打工混口饭吃。
　　——综艺直播——
　　白清徐：各位观众有钱的捧个钱场，有人的捧个人场，我给大家表演个捉鬼魔术。
　　弹幕：装神弄鬼，娱乐圈毒瘤！
　　恶鬼退散后……
　　弹幕：卧槽，还能这样？！白清徐你是我的神！
　　——鬼界闯关——
　　白清徐：不好意思，你听过‘古有孙悟空大闹地府，今有白清徐横闯鬼关’吗？
　　小鬼：什么玩意儿？白清徐谁啊？啥时候闯的鬼关？
　　白清徐：在下不才，正是白清徐，我打算今天闯鬼关。
　　小鬼：……日！哪里来的祸害！
　　——
　　白清徐所及之处，没有他不砸的场子，他还以为自己只是混口饭吃，依旧是个混子。
　　但是大家咋都成了他的粉丝？他不是万人嫌全网黑吗？就连顶流鬼王都成了他的cp……
　　白清徐：前辈，有镜头……
　　某影帝：哦，刚好撒点糖。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6234565ecb05541190b3d52f6425bd27~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"可燃冰kz","author_id":"","book_id":"7308268153224580158","book_name":"惊！全网黑靠捉鬼成了疯批顶流","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1341人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7308268334443676222","read_count":"1341","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"236998"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"139","tags":"双男主,现代,穿越,娱乐圈,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/051428c13cb7fd25ccbf7d2878cc2688~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454632&x-signature=H5BP1wbEGR9vuuPGdnVh2yq2Cb4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110190724476","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"156"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205712A4337A48CEC715573BBF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15327,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":3211},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7386144008997618457","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别好看。怎么说呢？这本书逻辑很好，然后呢有很多伏笔，人设也写的很饱满。每个人都是有些有用，每个剧情发生当然也是有原因的。总的来说这本书我觉得作者应该是把整篇文的所有每一步怎么写怎么做都想好了才开始写的，你不动点脑子是真看不懂，但是写的还是很好，作者文笔不错，想象力也很好，真的爱死这篇文~是他在我书荒的时候拯救了我呀，但是之后我又要过书荒日子了，悲催~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719724519,"group_id":"7308268153224580158","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"笑死……(看嘛，我死了)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2anFzNKaxrj4GhkzyH+kM47bQWv+6KzjDaVNixi6coN","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f66c350810184e4da215f020731b068b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794736&x-signature=2hOG9Q5jTIvrueAGstCaH1d%2FNww%3D","user_id":"3470536897733079","user_name":"锦鲤是金"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3470536897733079","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741122313,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7308268153224580158
